Name: curvature_aware_precision_routing
Title: Curvature-Aware Precision Routing for Efficient Mixed-Precision Quantization
Short Hypothesis: We hypothesize that a curvature-aware precision routing framework can efficiently optimize the mixed-precision quantization of deep neural networks, leading to improved accuracy and reduced computational overhead.
Related Work: Recent works such as EMQ, SNIP, and AMP-ViT have explored mixed-precision quantization techniques, but they lack a comprehensive understanding of the correlation between precision and quantization accuracy. Our approach builds upon these works by incorporating curvature-aware precision routing, which provides a more principled and efficient way to optimize mixed-precision quantization.
Abstract: This paper proposes a curvature-aware precision routing framework for efficient mixed-precision quantization of deep neural networks. Our approach combines geometric subspace diagnostics with deterministic optimization proxies to tightly couple precision routing with quantization accuracy. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework on various benchmark datasets, showing improved accuracy and reduced computational overhead compared to state-of-the-art mixed-precision quantization methods.
Experiments: Evaluate the proposed curvature-aware precision routing framework on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets using ResNet and MobileNet architectures.
Compare the performance of our framework with state-of-the-art mixed-precision quantization methods, including EMQ, SNIP, and AMP-ViT.
Investigate the impact of curvature-aware precision routing on the correlation between precision and quantization accuracy using the MQ-Bench-101 benchmark.
Risk Factors and Limitations: The proposed framework may require significant computational resources to optimize the precision routing.
The effectiveness of the framework may depend on the specific neural network architecture and dataset used.
The curvature-aware precision routing framework may not be applicable to all types of deep neural networks or quantization schemes.
